checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

findings: Bot detection systems: DataDome
CAPTCHA detected: recaptcha, captcha
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
No login form found at common paths

robots.txt references a sitemap
No sitemap.xml found
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 1863 divs with only 128 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 86/147 interactive elements have labels
No form inputs found
Found 117 elements with stable test selectors
Likely a client-side SPA — minimal server-rendered content
Good heading hierarchy: 14 headings, well-structured
2 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 92/94 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Proper 405 with Allow header: GET, HEAD

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~270,196 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 1% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 38 — deeply nested structure
Reading this page costs $0.34–$4.05 per load ($1.69–$20.26 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation
8/43 images missing alt text — agents can't understand these images
Found 3 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
1 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
11 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 119ms
Large payload: 1057KB — increases token cost for agents
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Resource heavy: 15 scripts, 52 stylesheets
Compression enabled: gzip

checks.name: agents_txt
findings: No agents.txt found — agents have no machine-readable permission manifest
